description: The SAP Business One Financials connector provides APIs for the financial accounting objects of SAP Business One: chart of accounts, journal entries, budgets, cost accounting dimensions, and tax setup, exposed through the [SAP Business One Service Layer](https://help.sap.com/doc/056f69366b5345a386bb8149f1700c19/10.0/en-US/Service%20Layer%20API%20Reference.html) (OData).
key-features: Create and query journal entries and posting templates
Manage the chart of accounts and account categories
Maintain budgets, budget scenarios, and distribution rules
Configure tax codes, VAT groups, and withholding tax
